name: Mistral AI API
what_it_does: Mistral AI API — European LLM provider offering high-performance open-weight models (Mistral 7B, Mixtral 8x7B, Mistral Large) via OpenAI-compatible REST API, enabling agents to access state-of-the-art language models with GDPR-compliant EU data processing.
use_cases: Agents using Mistral Large for complex reasoning tasks requiring a frontier model with EU data residency
Cost-efficient inference — agents using Mistral 7B or Mixtral 8x7B for high-volume text generation at lower cost than GPT-4
Embeddings generation — agents creating document embeddings with mistral-embed for semantic search and RAG pipelines
Function calling — agents using Mistral's tool calling support for structured output and tool-augmented reasoning
EU compliance workflows — agents processing sensitive European user data with GDPR-native LLM infrastructure
not_for: Multimodal applications — Mistral models are text-only; use OpenAI GPT-4o or Anthropic Claude for vision tasks
Image/audio generation — Mistral is text-focused; use Stability AI or ElevenLabs for generative media
Teams requiring maximum frontier model capability — Anthropic Claude 3.5 Sonnet or GPT-4o outperform on complex reasoning
best_when: You need strong LLM performance with EU data processing compliance and OpenAI-compatible API for easy migration, at competitive pricing.
avoid_when: You need vision, audio, or the absolute best reasoning — Anthropic or OpenAI have wider model capability coverage.

auth.notes: API key from Mistral platform (console.mistral.ai). Passed as Bearer token in Authorization header. OpenAI-compatible — drop-in replacement for OpenAI SDK by changing base_url. Key is workspace-scoped.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: Mistral 7B and Mixtral 8x7B available with rate limits on free tier; experimental models free
pricing.paid_tiers: Mistral Small: $2/M input, $6/M output; Mistral Medium: $2.7/$8.1; Mistral Large: $8/$24 per million tokens
pricing.notes: Competitive pricing below GPT-4 for equivalent performance. Free tier with rate limits for development. Open-weight models (Mistral 7B, Mixtral) can also be self-hosted for zero API cost.

performance.rate_limits: Free: ~1 req/s; Paid: higher rate limits by tier; token-per-minute limits vary by model

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: OpenAI-compatible API format — agents familiar with OpenAI SDK can switch with minimal changes. Error responses follow OpenAI error format. Streaming and function calling supported. Good documentation with examples.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: LLM inference is non-deterministic — same prompt produces different outputs. Temperature=0 increases but doesn't guarantee determinism. No idempotency keys for inference calls.
known_agent_gotchas: OpenAI compatibility is not 100% — some OpenAI features (logprobs, tool_choice='required') may differ in behavior
Model naming differs from OpenAI — Mistral model names change with versions; pin to specific versioned model IDs
Function calling format slightly differs from OpenAI for parallel tool calls — test migration carefully
Rate limits not prominently documented — monitor x-ratelimit headers in responses for current limits
EU data residency is a feature but also a constraint — data cannot be processed outside EU for compliance

security_score_components.security_notes: GDPR compliant with EU-only data processing — strong advantage for European agent applications. SOC2 in progress. TLS enforced. API key with no scope granularity. No training on API data by default.
